_comment: Claude Code project settings for demo-2026-strata-v3.
Connects this project to the Strata DS MCP server. Together with the
slash command, and .claude/hooks/UserPromptSubmit.json hook, this gives
Claude Code the full 5-layer enforcement of the DS rules:
Layer 1 — system prompt (this project's CLAUDE.md, auto-loaded)
Layer 2 — session briefing tool (call get_session_briefing once)
Layer 4 — UserPromptSubmit hook auto-injects on UI keywords
Layer 5 — ds-architect subagent fires on UI patterns
